subject: Re: [PATCH v3 2/2] cxl: Fix race of nvdimm_bus object when creating nvdimm objects

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the cxl_nvb reference is leaked due to a missing check for nvdimm_bus existence, and suggested adding a conditional statement to handle this case

reviews.author: Dave Jiang (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledged a concern about the race condition in nvdimm_bus object creation and explained that the patch already addresses this issue by introducing a flag to invalidate cxl_nvdimm when releasing nvdimm_bus.
reviews.raw_body:
Applied to cxl/fixes
16fb82cadd63 cxl: Fix race of nvdimm_bus object when creating nvdimm objects
e7e222ad73d9 cxl: Move devm_cxl_add_nvdimm_bridge() to cxl_pmem.ko
